queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Proton Mail' AND publisher = 'Proton';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE name = 'Proton Mail' AND publisher = 'Proton' AND version_compare(version, '1.12.1') < 0);

refs.6eacc8d6:
# Learn more about .exe install scripts:
# http://fleetdm.com/learn-more-about/exe-install-scripts
#
# Proton Mail ships as a Nullsoft (NSIS) installer; /S runs silent.
# Winget manifest is user-scope only; we follow the per-user FMA pattern.

$exeFilePath = "${env:INSTALLER_PATH}"

try {

$processOptions = @{
  FilePath = "$exeFilePath"
  ArgumentList = "/S"
  PassThru = $true
  Wait = $true
}

$process = Start-Process @processOptions
$exitCode = $process.ExitCode

Write-Host "Install exit code: $exitCode"
Exit $exitCode

} catch {
  Write-Host "Error: $_"
  Exit 1
}
